channel.title: Human Affairs
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Human Affairs

item.title: Ground Projects and the Joy of Living
item.description: Article by Anton Vydra DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/humaff-2024-0059

item.title: Relational Processes and Social Projections in Facebook Selfie-Quotation Juxtaposition: An Exploratory Study

item.title: How We Communicate Forgiveness to Our Partners Matters: Forgiveness-Granting Strategies, Forgiveness Tendency, Commitment, and Relationship Satisfaction in Dating and Married Couples
item.description: Article by Anton Vydra DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/humaff-2024-0022

item.title: How Do Metaphors Emerge from Cultural Images? On Hermeneutics of Sweetness
